item.title: primeCalendar
item.description: A .ics calendar file containing only days for which the date, when written YYYYMMDD, is prime. Grab a copy of the calendar on GitHub.

item.title: onkunfuri
item.description: onkunfuri is a Japanese-language project that provides a robust and highly accurate system for classifying Japanese kanji readings as on‑yomi or kun‑yomi directly from dictionary-style entries.

item.title: TEFL Level 5 course
item.description: I’m currently working towards the TEFL Level 5 diploma with the goal of being able to teach English to students internationally.

item.title: investigationOS
item.description: investigationOS is a free, open-source Obsidian vault designed to provide a standardised, scalable framework for structuring, organising and managing source information uncovered during criminal investigations.

item.title: colophon
item.description: Production This website was authored in Obsidian, converted into a static single-page application using Quartz, and published via GitHub Pages.

item.title: projects
item.description: Just so you know.. Below is a list of projects I have worked on, either as the main contributor or as a collaborator.

item.title: qr
item.description: Feel free to share the below QR code to lead people to this website! .

item.title: animations
item.description: Here lies a list of animations and interactive visualisations I have made.

item.title: applications
item.description: This page serves as a reference for a desktop applications that I have developed and published.

item.title: computational linguistics
item.description: In the study of linguistics, computational linguistics is an interdisciplinary field that combines linguistics and computer science to analyse and understand human language using computational methods.
